message:
fix(witness): fetch agent bead data once per polecat in zombie detection (gt-2gra)

During zombie patrol, getAgentBeadState, getAgentBeadLabels, getCleanupStatus,
and other functions each invoked `bd show <agentBeadID> --json` as a subprocess.
For a single polecat, the same bead was queried 3-5 times across different helper
functions.

Introduce agentBeadSnapshot that captures all needed fields from a single bd show
call. The snapshot is fetched once per polecat at the top of the detection loop
and passed to detectZombieLiveSession and detectZombieDeadSession. This reduces
per-polecat subprocess invocations from 3-5N to 1N per patrol cycle.

Original per-field functions (getAgentBeadState, getAgentBeadLabels, etc.) are
preserved for callers outside the zombie detection loop.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
